description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a black grip tape surface and visible wood layering along the sides. The deck is equipped with two pairs of wheels, one set in bright pink and the other in neon green, attached to metal trucks beneath the board. The grip tape is plain and unadorned, with visible mounting holes for the trucks at both ends. The wheels are classic street style, medium-sized, and lack any visible branding or markings. The trucks are standard, low-profile, and appear to be made of metal with no distinctive color or logo. There are no visible brand logos or graphic designs on the deck, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip tape deck, exposed wood edges, and mismatched pink and green street wheels on standard metal trucks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and the pink and green wheels partially visible beneath the deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the deck, the layered wood construction, and both sets of pink and green wheels clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the tail of the skateboard, grip tape, and the wheels beneath the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the deck's profile, wood layering, and both colored wheels, mirroring view 1.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels, medium size, one pair pink and one pair green, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard low-profile metal trucks, silver color, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black grip tape, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
